---
applyTo: "{README.md,ROADMAP.md,docs/**}"
description: "Use when updating project docs, roadmap, process docs, or developer guidance."
---

# Docs-focused instructions

## Entry points

Start in this order:

1. README.md
2. docs/context_playbook.md
3. docs/context_60s_checklist.md
4. docs/context_task_log_template.md
5. ROADMAP.md only if planning impact exists

## Working style

- Keep wording concise and operational.
- Avoid duplication across docs; link instead of repeating.
- Keep examples aligned with current commands and paths.

## Validation

- Verify internal links and command examples.
- Confirm docs reflect current package structure.
